name: annotateme
description: Data annotation and labeling platform with collaboration features

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "backend,frontend,ai" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend" "npm run ai:dev"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/backend && npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "backend,frontend,ai" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "npm run start --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run preview --workspace=packages/frontend" "npm run ai:start"
